programmes.show_description: This is CBBC! Tune every day from 7.00am.
The Stare. Animated series. Bitzer gets his wish for some peace and quiet when Shaun becomes hypnotised by Mowermouth the goat and finally stops bothering him.
Quark Games. Animated series. The heroes find themselves fighting for their lives on an alien world in Quark's latest money-spinning sports event.
Spiky Trevor. Trevor accidentally spikes himself on a cactus while questing and discovers that being covered in spikes has given him a unique superpower.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese

programmes.show_description: Keyring Cabin. The Lemmings' magic keyring has the incredible power to miniaturise any object.
Ink Lemonade. Patrick's lemonade has a secret ingredient!
Oscar of All Trades. The Odd Squad investigate strange events. Oscar tells Olive about his early days at Odd Squad.
We Want to Break Free. Dennis is exasperated to find that he can't land himself in detention.
Caravan of Chaos. Danny and Mick go on a caravan holiday in the car park.
You Could Fly Like a Bird? Anyone can fly like a bird - you just have to travel across the solar system to do it!

programmes.show_name: Bitesize Daily: 7-8 Year Olds: Science: Rocks and Soil
programmes.show_description: Learn about where rocks come from, how fossils form and what is in soil.
Episode 1. Dr Chris and Dr Xand learn all about space. They find out about gravity and how it formed all the planets and stars in the universe.
The Sun and Stars. Dr Maggie explores the sun and our galaxy's 300 billion stars.
Rot Box Investigation. A team of young science detectives investigate rot and decay through a series of experiments and activities, assisted by Dr George McGavin.
Bendy Bodies. The doctors reveal what makes you flexible as they test the incredible strength of a tendon to the max, and they find out what it's like to be an air ambulance pilot.
Gravity the Musical, a T-rex and Vampires on Holiday. Vampires on holiday, a T-rex at the doctor's, and a wicked song about gravity!
You Could Take a Lift to Space? What would happen if there really was a lift that took you all the way up to space?

programmes.show_name: New: British Science Week 2026 - Live Lesson
programmes.show_description: Join Grace Webb, Matt Green and awesome astronaut Tim Peake on a fact-finding mission to make Moon: The Movie, starring the one and only moon from Horrible Science!

programmes.show_name: Absolute Genius with Dick and Dom
programmes.show_description: Herschel. Dick and Dom reveal the genius of astronomer Caroline Herschel, the first woman to spot one of the most mysterious objects in the solar system, a comet.
Great White Shark. Steve Backshall learns about sharks. Steve looks at what makes the great white shark such a perfect predator and one of the greatest hunters on the planet.
Can I Have My Ball Back? Odd Sock Elliott needs to get his lost football back from next door's garden, so Andy and the Band fly into action and meet the scariest neighbour in the world!
Fire! Nitro and Phantom prank Fire at a kids' birthday party! The rest of the Gladiators have fun behind the scenes and pranking the audience at Sheffield Arena.
Octonauts and the Coconut Crisis. Preschool animation. Kwazii and the Octonauts help their friends the coconut crabs discover who is stealing their coconuts.
When Dad Got the Hiccups. Dad gets a severe case of Proximan hiccups. Big Lizard and Cosima do their best to help, but their attempt to scare Dad goes wrong when a real 'monster' turns up!
When You Wish Upon a Whale. Norman misses his whale friends. The Piris try to help, but his size proves a challenge.
Magic Mess. The heroes quest to save the forest from a magical mess after Blossom decides she would rather be picnicking than recycling.
Faking It. It's been ages since their last quest, and the heroes are losing their edge, so Friendlyface sends them on a fake quest to get rid of a monster.
Home Orc. In preparation for his mother's visit, an orc summons the Ninjas to find an orc cleaner to make his house dirty again after two fairies cleaned up his mess.
Don't Stop Me Now. Reality-style drama series. The Next Step competes in the sudden-death trio round. Michelle pushes herself before the trio dance in order to be ready.
The Champions. Clarissa faces up to her brother at lacrosse, while Mr Parker worries about Nancy in goal.
Trouble Doubled. Chelsey needs a lookalike to take her place in the DG, and Sid is back in the house.
Episode 1. Stop-motion animation. The potato racers drive each other round the bend, the DIY doughnuts attempt to fix the bathroom, and fearless Pete Parsnip takes on a ferocious foe.
Out of Order. Animated series. When the Farmer gets stuck in the loo, Bitzer has to get vital supplies to him as a matter of urgency.
Puppy Love. There's a new tripe hound in Beanotown, and Gnasher falls head over paws in love with her.
Snow Day. When the heroes wake up on Snow Day morning, there isn't a snowflake in sight! The heroes must quest to free the Snow Dragon and save Snow Day for all.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: Cat-bert Einstein. Mouse and Cat travel back in time.
Peaceable Enemies. A peace missionary panda tries to calm down Grizzy and the Lemmings during a fight.
Musician. When Duck accidentally gets a job as the band conductor at the local park, Frog is keen to play trumpet in the band - but Duck is even more keen to stop him!
Appointment TV. The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV.
The Unnatural. The spectre of a famous ballplayer appears to stop a star from breaking his record.

Double Trouble. To do their chores, Cyborg and Beast Boy clone themselves.
The Dusk Ball That Wouldn't Open. Ult leaves the Brave Olivine after an argument with Roy.

Head to Head! There's heart-pumping action in Ouchology, and the doctors discover why we get blisters.
Klay's Mission. An arctic battle tests the pilots like never before.
Preview. The world's youngest-ever doctor starts his new job, then has to fight to save it!

Fruit and Nuts. Animated series. Tired of eating grass, Shaun sets out to pinch one of the Farmer's prized apples, only to have every attempt ruined by his accomplice.

programmes.show_description: Great Wall Disco. Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a hidden mechanism on the Great Wall of China.

Swamps 'N' Gators. The Odd Squad investigate strange events. Olive and Otto get trapped inside a board game.
The Abominable Showman. JJ is torn between Blamjitsu with the yeti and helping the Dinmakers write a school song.
No Sweat! Danny and Mick get all hot and bothered as they attempt to build a new sauna!
You Built a Mega Slide. What would it take to build a slide so big that it went to the other side of the world?
...Science: States of Matter. Learn about solids, liquids and gas, heating and cooling, and the water cycle.
Episode 2. Dr Chris and Dr Xand learn about space. They find out about meteorites, and what happens when they land on Earth.
Experiments in Space. Dr Maggie reveals how experiments in space are helping us on Earth and in space.
Rot Box Results. A team of young science detectives investigate rot and decay through a series of experiments and activities, assisted by Dr George McGavin.
Basking Shark. Steve Backshall learns about our very own gentle giant - the basking shark. It can be found in the UK's coastal waters every spring and summer.
Ear We Go! The doctors reveal how your eardrum works to enable you to hear, and they find out how tough it is to be hospital radio hosts.
Light, Sound and Electricity Special. Big Danny and Big Manny find science shocking, and Da Vinci does a sound experiment.
You Could Run at the Speed of Sound? A fun run goes wrong when one ambitious runner tries going at the speed of sound.
Science Den. Zoe from Oxfordshire is mad about science and desperately wants a den where she can pursue her passions and carry out noisy, messy experiments whenever she wants!
Observatory Den. Mark and Lauren get the help of experts to design dream dens for children. Helena needs a den to help her reach for the stars and fulfil her science dreams.
Record Breaker Kid. Odd Sock Aniya needs to break a planet record and Andy and the Band won't give up - even with Whiff trying to stop them!
Giant! Giant is pranked by Nitro when he appears as a guest of honour at a fake school award ceremony! The other Gladiators have sneaky fun backstage at Sheffield Arena.

Mojo Mountain. The heroes must urgently quest to Mojo Mountain and speak to the Silver Faun to prevent Hoofius from losing his mojo forever.

Livin' on a Prayer. Reality-style drama series. With Sloane disqualified and Michelle injured, the team does not have enough dancers to dance in the final.
